title: Danteh 32x Revamp
description: I've edited the uhc texture pack "Danteh 32x" for the newer version.
body:
# Danteh 32x Revamp
A texture pack that does not require any additional mods.

## 📖 What's this Texture Pack?
This texture pack is a revamped version of Danteh, brought up to version 1.20.2+. However, my version is based on the revamp "Danteh 32x Revamp (Collab with DeathyBroxd)".

## ✅ Features:
- Custom items (tools, weapons, armor, buckets, potions, ender pearls, and various types of food)
- Custom GUI (The GUI is designed in a dark blue style)
- Custom blocks
- PVP extras (smaller shield & totem)
- AppleSkin fix
- And more!

## 📖 Usage
Using the texture pack is simple.

This texture pack needs to be placed in the resourcepacks folder.

Once activated (in the correct version), you should notice a change. This change affects items, blocks and the GUI.

## 📖 Compatibility
- The texture pack should run normally if mods like Sodium and Optifine are installed.
- The GUI may vary between some versions, which could lead to errors.
